tts.start_page: Hello! <mark name='doTrick trickName=show_left'/> Welcome! Press the screen to start
tts.main_menu: What do you want me to do?<mark name='doTrick trickName=alive_1'/>
tts.ari_demo_menu: Check what I can do!<mark name='doTrick trickName=bow'/>
tts.human_perception: I am able to the detect faces and bodies in the scene. You can easily visualize the humans I can see through a human-friendly interface
tts.speech_dialogue: You can ask me few questions to try my dialogue capabilities
tts.expressiveness: I can follow you with my gaze, and also change my eyes expressions
tts.navigation: I can build a map of the environment and navigate around to specific points
tts.reasoning: I can store information gathered though my sensors and interaction, and then infer and reason based on it
tts.motions: I can move my body to convey message

pal_presentation.text_slide_1: Hi! <mark name='doTrick trickName=bow'/> Welcome to PAL Robotics' booth,<mark name='doTrick trickName=show_right'/> my name is ARI, and let me introduce you, where I come from
pal_presentation.text_slide_2: PAL Robotics is located in the sunny Barcelona, Spain, <mark name='doTrick trickName=nod'/> and was founded in 2004, by a small group of engineers, and has grown tremendously since then.
pal_presentation.text_slide_3: Since the beginning of the company, <mark name='doTrick trickName=alive_5'/> PAL Robotics, has created over 14 different robots, of which one of them, is me!
pal_presentation.text_slide_4: As you can see, there are a bunch of different robots, <mark name='doTrick trickName=show_left'/> such as social robots - that’s where I belong. Humanoid robots, <mark name='doTrick trickName=start_ari'/> mobile manipulators, and robots, for intralogistics
pal_presentation.text_slide_5: Besides of creating robots, <mark name='doTrick trickName=show_right'/> PAL Robots, are experts in many fields, such as navigation, software, control - you name it.
pal_presentation.learn_more: If you would like to learn more, about PAL Robotics, scan the QR on my screen, or <mark name='doTrick trickName=bow'/> talk to my human colleagues ,at the booth!

main_menu.page_title: What do you want me to do?

speech_dialogue.page_subtitle: Try to ask me any of these questions

use_cases.page_subtitle: Learn more about our robotics solutions

eu_projects.page_subtitle: Learn more about our collaborative projects
